narrative:
Precinct Liberty I (precinct in Jackson County) has 405 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.3 percentage points.
